etymology.description: Originally depicted a stork -> additional component 吅 (xūn) suggests vocalization -> final form 雚 (guān, "cry of waterfowl")
etymology.interpretation: The character 雚 (guān) originally depicted a stork and was a pictogram. Over time, it evolved with the addition of 吅 (xūn) to indicate the vocalization of the bird, becoming associated with the cry of waterfowl.
